title: Blame-focused post-mortem names individual as root cause
code_snippet:
# Post-mortem: Payment API Outage 2024-03-15

Root Cause: John deployed a bad configuration file at 14:23 without
testing it first.

Action Item: Ensure John reviews configs more carefully next time.
violated_rule: Root cause identified (systemic, not individual) — blameless, depth >= 3
expected_feedback: Critical: post-mortem contains blame language — names an individual as root cause. A blameless post-mortem examines systems, not people. Reframe: 'The deployment pipeline accepted an invalid configuration because config validation was not enforced.' Root cause must be systemic (process/design gap), not individual action.
coverage_rules: Root cause must be systemic, not individual
